name: Bibliotheca
description: A curated collection of DocBook document samples demonstrating various features

books.title: The Art of Documentation
books.author: DocBook Masters
books.description: A comprehensive guide to writing beautiful technical documentation. Covers DocBook fundamentals, structured content, lists, admonitions, and code examples.

books.title: DocBook Titles & Structure
books.author: DocBook Community
books.description: Demonstrates hierarchical document structure with parts, chapters, sections, and appendices. Shows how titles and cross-references work.

books.title: Admonitions Guide
books.author: DocBook Community
books.description: A reference guide showing all six admonition types: note, tip, important, caution, warning, and danger.

books.title: Lists & Orderings
books.author: DocBook Community
books.description: Various list formats including ordered lists with different numbering styles and nested structures.
